meaning: n.流出物,流出,(时间的)消逝
examples: The objective is to explore the role of efflux pump in drug resistance to fluoroquinolones in Stenotrophomonas maltophilia.
Contracture occurs when the efflux of calcium is prevented by removing the extracellular sodium.
Study and determine efflux nozzle of performance become the focus that technical staff pays close attention to.
